data.raceComments: {"comment":"Absolute raffle to close Cup Day. Leaning to 18. MOLTEUNO who led all the way for an impressive win in a BM58 over 1100m at Goulburn last start. Up in grade but is lightly raced and open to improvement at the third run back. 4. SOUL LADY hasn't threatened in her two runs this time in work, both in open company, although she wasn't too far off them at Canberra last time. Goes well here at this trip. Cherry ripe and can win despite 61.5kgs. 13. WONDER STEP chimed in late and just missed the placings when fresh from a spell over 1000m at Orange last start. A risk at this trip but does look to be back in good order. 14. JACKPOT STAR has not raced since finishing 4.5 lengths away in fourth over 1300m at Goulburn on October 7. Did finish in the money first-up last prep at Albury over 1000m. Should be primed for this.","runners":[18,4,13,14],"exclusive":false}
